prestazioni: LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant for automatic, LS3 for manual) forced induction via Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit with 10-rib serpentine drive system, upgraded fuel system with Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors, and Motec M150 ECU for precise boost control and ignition timing (targeting 8.5psi for 600whp on 98 RON fuel).

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Harrop heavy-duty 9.5-inch differential with 3.73:1 gear ratio, upgraded axles with Mark Williams 35-spline CV joints, and a Tilton twin-disc clutch (for manual variants) or Harrop HD torque converter (for automatic variants) to handle increased power.

Suspension overhaul with Pedders XA Extreme IRS coilovers (adjustable damping and ride height), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and SuperPro poly bushings (full kit) for improved chassis rigidity and cornering precision.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using VE/VF Commodore-specific Rocket Bunny V2 kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and rear diffuser), paired with a carbon fiber hood from Seibon Carbon for weight reduction.

OEM+ aggressive stance achieved via Work Meister S1 3P 19x10.5 +15 front and 19x12 +25 rear wheels (ET adjusted for fitment), wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear) for maximum grip.

Aerodynamic and functional upgrades including a custom 4-inch dual-exit exhaust system by Manta Exhausts (304 stainless steel, resonated center section), and a carbon fiber rear wing from APR Performance (GT-250 model, adjustable angle) for downforce optimization.
